_comment: Key names only — never commit real values. Sync with `node deploy/cloudflare/scripts/sync-secrets.mjs` or `wrangler secret put <KEY> --config deploy/cloudflare/wrangler.api.jsonc`.
DATABASE_URL: <mysql://USER:PASSWORD@HOST:PORT/DB or postgres://…; required when Hyperdrive is not bound>
REALTIME_GRANT_SECRET: <separate 32+ byte random string for signed realtime connection grants>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: <Google OAuth client ID; omit if unused>
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: <Google OAuth client secret; omit if unused>
WECHAT_WEB_APP_ID: <WeChat Open Platform website application AppID; omit if unused>
WECHAT_WEB_APP_SECRET: <WeChat Open Platform website application AppSecret; omit if unused>
WECHAT_MINI_PROGRAM_APP_ID: <WeChat Mini Program AppID; omit if unused>
WECHAT_MINI_PROGRAM_APP_SECRET: <WeChat Mini Program AppSecret; omit if unused>
AI_API_KEY: <model provider API key; omit to disable the trip agent>
CAPTCHA_SECRET_KEY: <required only when CAPTCHA_PROVIDER is set as a var>
UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY: <Unsplash Access Key for trip cover photos on create; omit to keep SVG placeholder>
SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN: <CI-only token for source-map upload; do not sync to the Worker>
